title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Persistent Systems Consulting Pvt Ltd - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Persistent Systems Consulting Pvt Ltd - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Backend Developer looking for your next big career move? Persistent Systems Consulting Pvt Ltd in Howrah offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Persistent Systems Consulting Pvt Ltd:
Persistent Systems Consulting Pvt Ltd is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in JavaScript

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Life and accident insurance
• Annual performance appraisal
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Howrah, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Persistent Systems Consulting Pvt Ltd!
